candidates.name: vectorize-io/hindsight
candidates.title: Hindsight: Agent Memory That Learns
candidates.description: Open-source agent memory system with 16.6K stars. Learns from agent interactions to improve retrieval and context over time.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search `"agent memory" pushed:>=2026-06-17`; pushed 2026-06-19T04:32:21Z; stars 16632. High-traffic memory system directly relevant to vnem's memory category.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: One of the most-starred dedicated agent memory projects. Relevant for coding agents that need persistent, improving context across sessions.

reasons: GitHub API rate limit prevented README inspection.
Memory systems inherently involve sensitive data permissions.

candidates.name: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
candidates.title: TencentDB Agent Memory
candidates.description: Fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive retrieval system. TypeScript implementation from Tencent Cloud.
candidates.signal_summary: Matched GitHub search `"agent memory" pushed:>=2026-06-17`; pushed 2026-06-17T09:01:08Z; stars 5900. Major cloud vendor entering agent memory space.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: First-party agent memory from Tencent Cloud signals enterprise demand for local-first agent memory. Multi-tier architecture is a useful reference pattern.

reasons: GitHub API rate limit prevented README inspection.
Early-stage project with limited community track record.

candidates.name: hn-48583928
candidates.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
candidates.description: Hacker News discussion (762 points, 192 comments) about widespread Trojan malware distribution through GitHub repositories. Critical security signal for agent tooling ecosystem.
candidates.signal_summary: Top HN story (762 points, 192 comments) on 2026-06-19. Researcher found 10k GitHub repos distributing Trojan malware. Directly relevant to repository trust review processes.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Reinforces the importance of Hermes' repository trust review system. Builders should be aware that GitHub repository popularity alone is not a safety signal.

reasons: Social signal only; no specific repository to review.
Important security awareness signal for the ecosystem.
